reviews.author: Małgorzata Tyczyno
reviews.text: Professional tax office

reviews.author: jas malgosia
reviews.text: I recommend

reviews.author: Jack Bo
reviews.text: They do not know or simply do not comply with the Act on Ownership of Premises Art. 12. 1. The owner of the premises has the right to co-use the common property in accordance with its intended purpose.

reviews.author: Barbara Kuroń-Misztal
reviews.text: REMGroup is the property manager of my building, and I'm very pleased with their work. Since REMGroup took over, I've noticed significant improvements in many areas. Communication is always smooth and seamless, which is extremely important. Whenever I had questions or concerns, they were answered quickly and competently. I especially appreciate their approach to environmental issues during the renovation of my building. REMGroup didn't ignore this aspect, as is often the case in Poland, where indifference is commonplace. Instead, the property manager carefully analyzed the impact of the renova

reviews.author: Sylwia Maliszewska
reviews.text: At first, the collaboration was good, but after a few years, communication became very poor. They don't respond to emails. They drag on everything. Water pours from the gutters during rain. After reporting the problem, I was told that an inspection had been performed... I don't know how. The holes in the gutter are visible from the sidewalk. After a good few months, we managed to get a resolution passed... We'll be renovating the electrical system in the staircase. I sent them a new bid and the contractor's estimate. The resolution included the old amount. Of course, I emailed them about it, b

reviews.author: Peter
reviews.text: Unfortunately, the management is very poor. Kłodzka Street 5, 3, and 1 are a disaster. There's a very dangerous playground, people park their cars where they shouldn't, and every day, some guy drives right up to the staircase at 5 a.m. and doesn't turn off his engine, waking up half the building. Apparently, during the meeting, the management promised to close the entrance to the staircase, but that was all they kept. Furthermore, the cleaning company was also a mistake.

reviews.author: Sector473
reviews.text:
My question is simple: who got screwed for changing the cleaning company at Kłodzka Street, 5, 3, or 1???

The current company is a joke (on a scale of 1-10, only a 1; the previous one was a solid 7). They don't even have cleaning supplies, they don't clean at all. It's filthy, stinky, and miserable. The woman who shows up once a week cleans three cages with a dirty mop.

Some guy mows the grass with a lawnmower on SUNDAY!!!! Is this some kind of joke or a hidden camera?

We demand not only that the previous cleaning company be reinstated, but also that I spend a few months collecting signatur

reviews.author: Róża Maciejska
reviews.text: My interaction with President Tomasz was exceptionally unpleasant and left a very negative impression. I encountered a dismissive attitude and a lack of respect, which I consider absolutely unacceptable in this position. In my opinion, this person lacks the appropriate level of personal culture or competence required to run a cooperative. This experience undermined my trust in the entire institution.

reviews.author: Aneta Klicińska
reviews.text: The housing cooperative should be banned from engaging in any development activities. There are massive delays, failure to honor contracts, and property prices are rising just before handover. The quality of the plaster, floors, and balconies is abysmal. Only the defects that were supposed to be fixed by an external contractor, such as replacing the window glass, have been repaired. The cooperative is blaming the market situation and, I believe, expects future residents to be grateful that they even completed the project. I don't recommend it.

reviews.author: jozef labuda
reviews.text: The place is nice, they should tidy up the sidewalks, in one place they have them and in another place they don't, the road leading to the street is wet, there is no room for pedestrians, they should tidy up the ditches, the trees are broken, the cable is hanging very low

reviews.author: Atram Lawok
reviews.text: The housing association ignored the mold problem in the apartment, blaming it on unfavorable weather conditions. After a tenacious fight, it was finally discovered that there was a leak in the roof, which is why mold was appearing in one spot in the apartment. I do not recommend them. They sent incompetent people and dismissed me without engaging or attempting to resolve the problem.

reviews.author: Tomasz Makuch
reviews.text: Opóźnienie w realizacji, znaczne zwiększenie ceny nieruchomości na chwilę przed oddaniem mieszkania i troche drobnych wpadek. Niemniej pięknie usytuowana inwestycja, mieszkanie wykończone ładnie. Taka słodko gorzka relacja.

reviews.author: Marek Makowski
reviews.text: Probably the most reliable, organized, honest, and hard-working housing cooperative in Wrocław. As a property manager, they're probably also top-tier in Wrocław :) It sounds like a compliment, but it's... true :)

reviews.author: Dagmara Słowińska
reviews.text: After contacting the housing cooperative, I was informed that an electrician would arrive within an hour. As it later turned out, the electrician was never notified at all.

reviews.author: Black Moon
reviews.text: A genuine desire to help.

reviews.author: Zuzanna
reviews.text: The best service in the world

reviews.author: Justyna G
reviews.text: A cooperative that responds to tenant complaints! The people working there are helpful, empathetic, and always explain everything.

reviews.author: Damian
reviews.text: Every year, it's the same story with the heating. It's winter and it doesn't work again. Despite huge price increases, it's currently almost 100 PLN, and the rent for a 46m² apartment is already 950 PLN. Our apartments are cold. I recommend avoiding this housing cooperative.

reviews.author: Michal S
reviews.text: Rents are high because the high management salaries have to be financed somehow. The constant selling of properties, coupled with exorbitant rents, is still a long way off. My landlord pays 1,700 PLN for 87m². Isn't that normal? I personally pay 1,100 PLN for 50m². The building isn't insulated and can be replaced like that. We blocked the funds at the general meeting through a vote, so out of anger they raised the rent. You're worthy of television.

reviews.author: Adam
reviews.text: In four years, prices have increased by over 100 percent. A 50-square-meter apartment costs around 1,000 PLN. Larger apartments cost even more. It's almost like paying mortgage installments. Furthermore, hot water is often problematic, with brown water often leaking out. This is a matter for the media.

reviews.author: Dominik Dolecki
reviews.text: I'm in the process of selling a property. The ladies are very helpful, answering every question and holding my hand when needed. Thank you.

reviews.author: Tadeusz Kacprzyński
reviews.text: Good Housing Cooperative

results.name: Towarzystwo Budownictwa Społecznego Wrocław Spółka z o.o.

reviews.author: Fadi Skaikar
reviews.text: Good

reviews.author: Ewa Stączek
reviews.text: I've been without gas for five days because I'm waiting for a new stove to be installed. No one even came to see if the old one could be repaired. They couldn't tell me when I'd get the stove. I called two or three times a day, supposedly passing the information on to someone else. No one called back. In the end, it turned out that the plumbers who were supposed to install the stove didn't even know I'd called. One woman called back after four days. I didn't know what to do or when I'd get the stove. The men were supposed to arrive when I left the house. They said no one told them I'd reported

reviews.author: Dorota
reviews.text: Sometimes it's hard to get through on the phone, but the people are very helpful, and you can always reach an agreement. I've been with TBS for two years now, and I honestly don't know why people complain so much, and the prices are half what they would normally rent. Greetings to all people of good will!

reviews.author: Kamila Krusińska
reviews.text: The door on Wojanowska Street hasn't been repaired for a year. Someone came twice, tried to fix the door to get the intercom working, but gave up. No one at TBS seems interested, and once, when I called, the lady complained that the door wasn't working, as if I'd broken it. It's beyond words. And calling there is next to impossible.

reviews.author: artur art
reviews.text:
I'm pleased to offer a positive review of the property management company Tactum. Our collaboration runs very smoothly, and all building-related issues are taken seriously and resolved promptly.

Mr. Grzegorz deserves special mention for his dedication to his work. He addresses every reported issue immediately – he doesn't procrastinate and doesn't leave residents alone to cope. It's clear he's committed to truly resolving issues, not just managing the property formally.

During the replacement of a door in the building, Mr. Grzegorz supervised the contractor's work throughout the day.

The co

reviews.author: Volodymyr Budnyi
reviews.text: I had a heating problem, and Mr. Grzegorz quickly helped and explained what was wrong. Definitely the best property manager!

reviews.author: Krzysztof Walentynowicz
reviews.text: This is the first time I've dealt with such a professional company, and one of the best in their field. Mr. Grzegorz is a down-to-earth, friendly, and cultured individual. A professional through and through. All matters are handled very quickly; he responds to emails promptly, always returns calls, and explains everything in detail. Thanks to Mr. Grzegorz and Tectum, I know that the building where I purchased my apartment and the surrounding infrastructure will always be well-maintained, and any defects will be promptly repaired. Thank you and best regards.

reviews.author: Filip Węcławek
reviews.text: An excellent property manager. His excellent communication is commendable, especially with Maciej and Grzegorz. Every issue was resolved very efficiently. Since Tectum24 took over management of our community, order and communication have finally returned. I highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Julia Lis
reviews.text: I highly recommend them, I don't have to worry about my apartment because it's safe under their care ☺️

reviews.author: Dariusz Wysocki
reviews.text: Communication with the company was excellent. Easy to use from the website owner to manage online reservations. All information was readily available at all times.

reviews.author: Jakub Byzdra
reviews.text: They cancel the reservation 1.5 weeks before arrival even though we booked a year in advance, no thanks and no regards

reviews.author: Iwona Cichosz
reviews.text: We've been working together for three years now, at a high level, reliably and professionally, and the apartment we entrusted to them is like new. I highly recommend them! The collaboration and the apartments.

reviews.author: Andrzej Pelesz
reviews.text:
I know her, I work with her – I highly recommend her and encourage you to collaborate.

Professional approach, topics "organized" here and now
I RECOMMEND
Danuta Ł

reviews.author: Piotr Sanok
reviews.text: I recommend it! The service is of a very high standard. Top notch!

reviews.author: Michał Słowiński
reviews.text: Very nice and helpful people, I recommend them 😊

reviews.author: Michał K
reviews.text: Tak średnio bym powiedział

reviews.author: Izabela Musiał
reviews.text: Experience and professionalism. The facilities are of a high standard. I can fully recommend the work performed.

reviews.author: Mateusz Artmanski
reviews.text: Nice company, large parking lot for customers and employees.

reviews.author: Hanna Huryk
reviews.text: The best building in Wrocław ;)

results.name: ZUH PARTNER NIERUCHOŚCI Sp. z o.o.
results.address: Aleja Marszałka Józefa Piłsudskiego 92, 41-303 Dąbrowa Górnicza, Poland

reviews.author: Jan Kania
reviews.text: Okay

reviews.author: Martyna Bartoszewicz
reviews.text: This company's management can be described in one word: DRAMA. A multitude of broken promises, deadlines, and, of course, plans. They also lied. This is certainly not a company that works for the residents. After the manager's salary increase (after which we were promised they would complete the agreed-upon work faster because we had raised the funds), absolutely nothing happened. In fact, it's only gotten worse. A simple task like cleaning the staircases is a huge problem for them. I'm posting photos after today's "cleaning." For your own peace of mind and your wallet, do not use this company

reviews.author: Barbara Czepelska
reviews.text: A failure. They haven't completed any of the agreed-upon work, they're not honoring the agreement, and they're not responding to complaints. The building is dirty and neglected. Since we terminated the agreement, they've practically stopped cleaning, not that they were doing a good job before. They know where to go to get the money, but when we ask for an accounting of how it was spent, we're ignored.

reviews.author: Grzegorz Kusik
reviews.text:
They're unreliable. You can report faults and they'll be silent.
The day after tomorrow, it'll be two weeks since they replaced the main entrance door to the building, and the old key still hasn't been replaced. Replacing a light bulb in the hallway can take up to three weeks.

I don't recommend them, and I don't wish them well.

reviews.author: Adrianna Maliszkiewicz
reviews.text: Professional and reliable approach. The community was rescued from debt. The staff is always helpful. I recommend it!
